## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] If schema/enums changed: Prisma migration added and `shared/enums.ts` stays in sync
- [ ] No hardcoded balance values (use `packages/shared/src/constants.ts`)
- [ ] No secrets or internal paths in tracked files
